title: UTA Board Detail
description: Per-slot drill-down. Pass/fail trail, latency, IO, channel/block failures, power events, sense keys, smart reports, temperature, raw logs.

list.name: slot_id
list.label: Slot (Board)
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT slot_id FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id != '' ORDER BY slot_id

list.name: log_filename
list.label: Log File
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT log_filename FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC

targets.rawSql: SELECT status FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT count() FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime

SELECT count() FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'status') = 'PASSED' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime

SELECT count() FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'status') = 'FAILED' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime

panels.title: SPOR Cycles
panels.description: Latest SPOR (sudden power-off recovery) cycle count

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(JSONExtractInt(parsed,'count')) FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event') = 'spor_cycle' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime
SELECT dateDiff('minute', started_at, last_seen_at) FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT concat(platform, ' / ', firmware_version) FROM uta.test_sessions FINAL WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' ORDER BY last_seen_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Test Steps — pass/fail timeline
panels.description: Each test step (TL_INIT, TL_INFO, TL_FFU, …) shown as a coloured band. Source: parsed.event=test_step kind=end.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(log_timestamp, ingested_at) AS time, JSONExtractString(parsed,'step') AS metric, JSONExtractString(parsed,'status') AS value FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event') = 'test_step' AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'kind') = 'end' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY time

panels.title: Test Step Duration (s)
panels.description: Wall-clock seconds reported by `>>>ELAPSED_TIME`. The X-axis is the step occurrence; sort orders by time.

targets.rawSql: SELECT concat(toString(rowNumberInAllBlocks()),' ', any(step)) AS step, any(elapsed) AS elapsed_seconds FROM ( SELECT line_number, JSONExtractString(parsed,'elapsed') AS step_raw, JSONExtractInt(parsed,'elapsed_seconds') AS elapsed FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='test_step' AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'kind')='elapsed_time' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY line_number ) ARRAY JOIN [step_raw] AS step GROUP BY line_number, step ORDER BY line_number

SELECT toStartOfInterval(coalesce(log_timestamp, ingested_at), INTERVAL 5 SECOND) AS time, JSONExtractString(parsed,'metric') AS metric, avg(JSONExtractInt(parsed,'value')) AS value FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='io_stat' AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'metric') IN ('max_latency_us','avg_latency_us','min_latency_us') AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(coalesce(log_timestamp, ingested_at), INTERVAL 5 SECOND) AS time, JSONExtractString(parsed,'metric') AS metric, sum(JSONExtractInt(parsed,'value')) AS value FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='io_stat' AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'metric') IN ('read_io_bytes','write_io_bytes') AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(coalesce(log_timestamp, ingested_at), INTERVAL 5 SECOND) AS time, JSONExtractString(parsed,'metric') AS metric, max(JSONExtractInt(parsed,'value')) AS value FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='io_stat' AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'metric') IN ('reset_count','por_count','pmc_count','io_count','read_io_count','write_io_count') AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY time, metric ORDER BY time

panels.title: Channel × Block Failures
panels.description: Where on the device pass/fail markers landed. Source: parsed.event=pass_fail.

targets.rawSql: SELECT JSONExtractInt(parsed,'loc_ch') AS channel, JSONExtractInt(parsed,'loc_blk') AS block, countIf(JSONExtractString(parsed,'status')='PASSED') AS pass_count, countIf(JSONExtractString(parsed,'status')='FAILED') AS fail_count FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='pass_fail' AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'loc_ch') != '' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY channel, block ORDER BY fail_count DESC, channel, block LIMIT 50

panels.title: Power events timeline
panels.description: Resets, power on/off, HW resets, and SPOR cycles.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(log_timestamp, ingested_at) AS time, JSONExtractString(parsed,'event') AS event, raw_line FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event') IN ('power_action','hw_reset','spor_cycle','buffer_op','operation_complete','nop_duration','random_sleep') AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 200

panels.title: Sense Key errors
panels.description: SCSI sense-key reports indicating device-level failures.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(log_timestamp, ingested_at) AS time, JSONExtractString(parsed,'sense_key') AS sense_key, JSONExtractString(parsed,'asc') AS asc_code, JSONExtractString(parsed,'ascq') AS ascq, JSONExtractString(parsed,'note') AS note FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='sense_key' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Smart Customer Report — key metrics
panels.description: Bad-block counts, EC, exceptions reported by the device. Source: parsed.event=smart_customer_report.

targets.rawSql: SELECT JSONExtractString(parsed,'report_key') AS metric, anyLast(JSONExtractString(parsed,'report_value')) AS latest_value, count() AS samples FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='smart_customer_report' AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'report_key') != '' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY metric ORDER BY metric LIMIT 100

SELECT JSONExtractString(parsed,'key') AS metric, anyLast(JSONExtractInt(parsed,'value')) AS latest_value FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='temperature' AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'kind')='field' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY metric ORDER BY metric

SELECT JSONExtractString(parsed,'key') AS exception_key, anyLast(JSONExtractString(parsed,'value')) AS value, anyLast(JSONExtractString(parsed,'note')) AS note, count() AS samples FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='secure_smart_report' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime GROUP BY exception_key ORDER BY exception_key

SELECT JSONExtractString(parsed,'stage') AS stage, JSONExtractString(parsed,'step') AS step, JSONExtractString(parsed,'from') AS detected_from, JSONExtractString(parsed,'to') AS detected_to FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND JSONExtractString(parsed,'event')='set_fw_type' AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY line_number LIMIT 50

panels.title: Raw log lines
panels.description: Full raw lines for this slot, newest first. Click to expand.

targets.rawSql: SELECT coalesce(log_timestamp, ingested_at) AS time, raw_line AS line, map('event', JSONExtractString(parsed,'event'), 'line_no', toString(line_number), 'file', log_filename) AS labels FROM uta.log_events WHERE slot_id = '${slot_id}' AND match(log_filename, '${log_filename:regex}') AND ingested_at >= $__fromTime AND ingested_at <= $__toTime ORDER BY ingested_at DESC LIMIT 500
